products.name: Nexus Core — Enterprise License
products.description: Full IP transfer of the complete Nexus Core Enterprise AIOS. Includes kernel (18 modules), multi-agent runtime (7 types), 100 executable functions (10 categories), hybrid memory OS, CLI, API, and infrastructure code.
features: 18 kernel modules (DI, EventBus, CommandBus, Cache, Security, etc.)
7-agent swarm runtime (Orchestrator, Coder, Tester, DevOps, Researcher, Security, Reviewer)

price_tiers.description: Standard + 4h architecture walkthrough + IaC deploy + 90-day support
Premium + dedicated engineering team (2 weeks) + SLA + custom integrations

products.name: Kernel Runtime Module Pack
products.description: All 18 kernel modules as a standalone Python package. DI Container, EventBus, CommandBus, Cache, Security, Config, Logger, Scheduler, Plugin, Module, Registry, Pipeline, Metrics, Health, Runtime, Bootstrap, Bus.
features: DI Container with service lifetime management

products.name: Multi-Agent Runtime
products.description: Production-ready multi-agent system with 7 agent types, task decomposition, and EventBus-driven communication.
features: 7 agent types (Orchestrator, Coder, Tester, DevOps, Researcher, Security, Reviewer)

products.name: 100 Functions Library
products.description: 100 pre-built executable functions across 10 categories. Each function is async, JSON-interface, and pipeline-compatible.
features: All functions execute with 100% success rate

products.name: Memory OS Engine
products.description: Hybrid vector + graph memory system with unified recall. Vector store (128-dim cosine similarity) + graph store (adjacency, BFS, path finding).
features: In-memory vector store (128-dim, numpy, cosine similarity)

price_tiers.description: Single + commercial license + upgrade path to ChromaDB/Neo4j

products.name: Infrastructure Pack (Docker + K8s + CI/CD)
products.description: Ready-to-deploy infrastructure configurations for running Nexus Core in production.
features: Terraform IaC scripts (AWS ECS/EKS, Azure AKS)

products.name: Enterprise Security Module
products.description: Zero-Trust security layer: RBAC, OIDC/SAML/OAuth2, mTLS, AES-256 encryption, audit logging.

price_tiers.description: Single + penetration testing report + compliance documentation

products.name: Nexus Engine (Legacy MVP)
products.description: Original CK-NEXUS MVP v0.95 — fully functional multi-provider AI chat engine with agent swarm, LINE/Telegram integration, and web dashboard.
features: Multi-provider AI chat (OpenAI, Groq, OpenRouter, Ollama)

price_tiers.description: Single + commercial license + migration guide to v1.0

products.name: Integration Connectors (LINE + Telegram)
products.description: Production-tested messaging integrations with LINE OAuth2 and Telegram bot gateway.

price_tiers.description: Single + setup assistance + bot deployment guide

products.name: Nexus Core + Infrastructure Bundle
products.description: Everything in Nexus Core Enterprise License + Infrastructure Pack at a discounted bundle price.

products.name: Full Stack Bundle
products.description: All Nexus Core components at a comprehensive bundle price.

price_tiers.description: Full stack — save $4,000 off individual pricing
Premium + dedicated engineering + SLA + custom features

products.name: Architecture Consultation (4-Hour Session)
products.description: Direct session with the core engineering team. Covers architecture decisions, deployment topology, scaling strategies, and customization roadmap.

price_tiers.description: Standard + follow-up session + architecture review document

products.name: Priority Support (30-Day)
products.description: Direct Slack/Telegram channel with the engineering team for questions, hotfixes, and deployment assistance.

products.name: Kubernetes Deployment Service
products.description: Full deployment of Nexus Core on your Kubernetes cluster — EKS, AKS, or self-managed.

price_tiers.description: Standard + cluster creation + CI/CD integration + 1-week support

products.name: Custom Function Development (Per Function)
products.description: Custom function development to extend Nexus Core's 100-function library. Your specification, our implementation.

products.name: Custom Agent Development (Per Agent)
products.description: Custom agent development following BaseAgent pattern. Your use case, our implementation.

products.name: Security Audit & Penetration Test
products.description: Comprehensive security review of your Nexus Core deployment, including penetration testing and compliance gap analysis.

price_tiers.description: Standard + manual penetration test + remediation support

products.name: Nexus Core LLM Failover Client
products.description: Standalone LLM client with automatic provider failover, circuit breaker pattern, and per-provider success rate tracking.

products.name: Nexus Core Vector Memory Plugin
products.description: Standalone in-memory vector store with 128-dim embeddings and cosine similarity search. Drop-in for any Python project.

price_tiers.description: Single + commercial license + upgrade path to ChromaDB

products.name: Nexus Core Pipeline Orchestrator
products.description: Standalone function pipeline engine supporting conditional execution, stop-on-success, and fallback chains.

price_tiers.description: Single + commercial license + custom pipeline templates

discounts.description: Early adopter discount — 20% off any product
Referral discount — 15% off for both referrer and referee
YC startup discount — 25% off Enterprise License

payment_methods.details: Available via Acquire.com or Flippa platform

notes: Enterprise licenses include full IP transfer with commercial terms
Source code delivered via GitHub repository ownership transfer
Support packages begin from date of transfer
Custom development scoped and quoted separately
Discounts cannot be combined unless explicitly stated
